lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Get OUT of my WAY!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Hey you! Human person thing! I've got a lil' task for you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do for you then?

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Oooo, I want ehm...

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: What did I want again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You tell me.

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: I want... [item]!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: What do you mean, what am I going to do with [item]? That's my business it is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't say anything...

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Good, good... now get me [item] within [15-20] minutes, and I'll have ehm... I don't know, I'll have something for you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay away from me!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Awww, you're just a worthless human, stop wasting my time!

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Got my ehm, ehm... got whatever I asked you to get yet, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, and I can't be bothered anymore.

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Bah, you're just a no good lousy human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, no, not yet...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was it again anyway?

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Lemme think... ehm... yeah, I want you to get [item], no questions asked!

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: I ashked you a shimple thing... get me [item] within [15-20] minutes... how difficult could that have been?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, uhm, sorry about that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But look, I've got what you asked for right here!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Not interested! If you can't even keep to a shingle time limit, what good are you then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, I've got what you asked me to get!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Did you now, did you? Ehm...

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: What did I ask you to get again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You wanted me to get [item], remember? Well, here you go!

lines.speaker: Rowdy dwarf
lines.text: Ooo, that'sh great! Let me get your reward... here, some coins for you.
